description: APS bilateral_receipt envelope wrapping the L1 wire signature. Both requesting and serving agents counter-sign the same outcome body. The L1 signature value (base64) is bound into evidenceCommitments[0].credentialHash via SHA-256.
signing_convention: Both signatures cover the canonical-JSON form of the receipt body (null-stripped, sorted keys) per ~/agent-passport-system/src/core/bilateral-receipt.ts. Signature bytes are returned as hex; canonical form is signed directly (no extra sha256 wrap).

outcome.summary: Wire-signed POST /api/task accepted by serving agent; outcome counter-signed under bilateral receipt envelope.
